headlines.desc: The U.K. is now running a trade deficit with its largest trading partner.

headlines.title: A major shift could soon happen in the Mag 7
headlines.desc: Quietly, shares of Google-parent Alphabet are on the verge of topping $5 trillion, and overtaking AI-leader Nvidia as the world's most valuable company.

headlines.title: Fed dissenters explain 'no' votes, saying they disagreed with hinting next move would be a cut
headlines.desc: Federal Reserve officials who voted this week against the post-meeting statement said they didn't think it was appropriate to signal that the next interest rate move would be lower.

headlines.title: Fed Governor Waller says Iran war and labor market risks are keeping central bank on hold
headlines.desc: Federal Reserve Governor Christopher Waller on Friday said current economic conditions are complicating the approach to interest rates.

headlines.title: Buying chip stocks is getting pricey. Traders don't care
headlines.desc: The VanEck Semiconductor ETF (SMH) tracking the sector is up more than 30% this month.

headlines.title: Hormuz blockade could deepen world’s worst energy crisis — and risk a dangerous misstep
headlines.desc: The U.S. naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz threatens to halt more tanker traffic, sending oil surging and risks drawing China into a widening confrontation with Washington.

headlines.title: Top Wall Street analysts like these 3 stocks for their long-term prospects
headlines.desc: The recommendations and analysis of these Wall Street experts can provide useful insights for stock selection.

headlines.title: Top Wall Street analysts pick these 3 dividend stocks for reliable income
headlines.desc: Those looking for a stable stream of passive income amid uncertainty can add stocks of some well-established dividend-paying companies to their portfolios.

headlines.title: This 'win-win' hedge trade is getting popular with traders
headlines.desc: The trade is fairly simple: sell downside protection in semiconductor names where volatility is expensive, and buy downside protection in the S&P 500, where it's relatively cheap.

headlines.title: Gulf states urge UN action to ensure Strait of Hormuz safety
headlines.desc: Draft resolution demands Iran halt attacks, pin-point mines and ensure passage of humanitarian aid through strait.

headlines.title: These 15 stocks trade like the hottest tech names — but they’re still under the radar
headlines.desc: For years now, Wall Street pundits have been talking about the “AI trade.” But exactly what they’re referring to isn’t always clear.

headlines.title: Block earnings show a growth pickup, in a potential validation of the massive AI push
headlines.desc: 100% of Block employees now use AI at work, three months after the company’s eye-popping mass-layoff announcement.

headlines.title: Coinbase turns into a poster child for the crypto selloff
headlines.desc: Coinbase’s quarterly earnings include a 40% on-year decline for transaction revenue, illustrating the effects of a weaker crypto market.

headlines.title: Coinbase posts steep first-quarter loss after slide in crypto prices, shares fall 4%
headlines.desc: Crypto trading platform Coinbase reported a surprise first-quarter loss and weaker-than-estimated revenue after the market close Thursday.
